differential_diagnoses: Delirium (metabolic, toxic, or secondary to medication)
next_steps: Extended video-EEG monitoring to capture and characterize the episodes of agitation and cognitive alteration
Comprehensive metabolic panel and toxicology screen to rule out acute causes of delirium
Lumbar puncture to evaluate for autoimmune or paraneoplastic limbic encephalitis
MRI repeat with epilepsy protocol to exclude new structural lesions or infiltrative processes
Formal psychiatric consultation for management of persistent psychosis and agitation
Review of medication side effects and potential drug-drug interactions, particularly regarding carbamazepine and clobazam
Multidisciplinary team conference to evaluate suitability for surgical resection given the mesial temporal lobe focus
